positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a majestic forest fox sitting on a mossy log, looking inquisitively at a cluster of oversized fireflies. The scene should feature deep emerald greens, earthy terracottas, and glowing amber accents. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau botanical illustration and modern graphic design, using thick, clean lines and bold, flat color blocks with selective use of delicate watercolor washes for texture. The composition must be centrally focused, creating a strong, recognizable silhouette suitable for printing on apparel. The overall mood is magical and serene. Studio lighting, high contrast, print-ready vector art quality.
